summary: Completed comprehensive testing of refactored stone verification application. Backend refactoring with helper functions and type hints successful. Frontend Dashboard component split into sub-components working correctly. All core functionality verified including stone verification, export features, and UI interactions.

minor_issues.issue: Test expects 200 for empty stone IDs but returns 400
minor_issues.impact: Test expectation issue, not a bug - 400 is correct behavior

minor_issues.issue: Toast notifications for empty input validation not consistently detected in test environment
minor_issues.impact: May be timing or test environment related

passed_tests: Stone verification with real IDs (LZ1809693, LZ2107107)
Results table display with correct data
Export to Excel via prepare-export + download token
Export to PDF via prepare-export + download token
File upload tab with format guide
Tab switching between Manual Entry and File Upload
Empty state display when no results
Export buttons enabled/disabled based on results

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor toast detection issue)
